name: Memory (LanceDB Pro)
description: Enhanced LanceDB-backed long-term memory with hybrid retrieval, multi-scope isolation, long-context chunking, and management CLI

apiKey.description: Single API key or array of keys for round-robin rotation

omitDimensions.description: When true, omit the dimensions parameter from embedding requests even if dimensions is configured

taskQuery.description: Embedding task for queries (provider-specific, e.g. Jina: retrieval.query)

taskPassage.description: Embedding task for passages/documents (provider-specific, e.g. Jina: retrieval.passage)

normalized.description: Request normalized embeddings when supported by the provider (e.g. Jina v5)

chunking.description: Enable automatic chunking for documents exceeding embedding context limits

apiVersion.description: API version for Azure OpenAI (e.g. 2024-02-01). Only used when provider is azure-openai.

enableManagementTools.description: Enable management/debug tools such as memory_list, memory_stats, and governance-oriented self-improvement review/extract actions

sessionStrategy.description: Choose session pipeline: plugin memory-reflection, built-in session-memory, or none. Default none keeps session summaries disabled unless explicitly enabled.

autoRecallMinLength.description: Minimum prompt length (in characters) to trigger auto-recall. Prompts shorter than this are skipped. Default: 15 for English, 6 for CJK.

autoRecallMinRepeated.description: Minimum number of turns before the same memory can be recalled again in the same session. Set to 0 to disable deduplication.

autoRecallTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for the entire auto-recall pipeline (embedding + search + rerank) in milliseconds.

autoRecallMaxItems.description: Maximum number of memories auto-injected per turn.

autoRecallMaxChars.description: Maximum total character budget for auto-injected memory summaries.

autoRecallPerItemMaxChars.description: Maximum character budget per auto-injected memory summary.

autoRecallMaxQueryLength.description: Maximum character length of the auto-recall query before truncation. Default: 2000.

maxRecallPerTurn.description: Hard per-turn injection cap applied after dedup. Acts as a safety ceiling on top of autoRecallMaxItems to prevent context inflation. Default: 10.

recallMode.description: Auto-recall depth mode. 'full': inject with configured per-item budget. 'summary': L0 abstracts only (compact). 'adaptive': analyze query intent to auto-select category and depth. 'off': disable auto-recall injection.

smartExtraction.description: Enable LLM-powered memory extraction. Falls back to regex capture when false.

extractMinMessages.description: Minimum conversation messages required before smart extraction runs.

extractMaxChars.description: Maximum conversation characters sent to the smart extraction LLM.

admissionControl.description: A-MAC-style admission governance on the smart-extraction write path. Rejects low-value candidates before persistence while preserving downstream dedup behavior for admitted candidates.

preset.description: Named admission tuning preset. Explicit admissionControl fields still override the selected preset.

rejectedAuditFilePath.description: Optional JSONL file path for durable admission reject audit records. Defaults to a file beside the plugin memory data directory.

rerankApiKey.description: API key for reranker service (enables cross-encoder reranking)

rerankEndpoint.description: Reranker API endpoint URL. Compatible with Jina-compatible endpoints and dedicated adapters such as TEI, SiliconFlow, Voyage, Pinecone, and DashScope.

rerankTimeoutMs.description: Rerank API timeout in milliseconds (default: 5000). Increase for local/CPU-based rerank servers.

rerankProvider.description: Reranker provider format. Determines request/response shape and auth header. Use tei for Hugging Face Text Embeddings Inference /rerank endpoints. DashScope uses gte-rerank-v2 with endpoint https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/api/v1/services/rerank/text-rerank/text-rerank.

recencyHalfLifeDays.description: Half-life in days for recency boost. Newer memories get higher scores. Set 0 to disable.

recencyWeight.description: Maximum recency boost factor added to score

filterNoise.description: Filter out noise memories (agent denials, meta-questions, boilerplate)

lengthNormAnchor.description: Length normalization anchor in chars. Entries longer than this get score penalized. Set 0 to disable.

hardMinScore.description: Hard cutoff after all scoring stages. Results below this score are discarded.

timeDecayHalfLifeDays.description: Time decay half-life in days. Old entries lose score gradually. Floor at 0.5x. Set 0 to disable.

reinforcementFactor.description: Access reinforcement factor for time decay. Frequently recalled memories decay slower. 0 to disable.

maxHalfLifeMultiplier.description: Maximum half-life multiplier from access reinforcement. Prevents frequently accessed memories from becoming immortal.

sessionMemory.description: Deprecated legacy switch. Kept for compatibility and mapped to sessionStrategy.

enabled.description: Deprecated. true -> sessionStrategy=systemSessionMemory, false -> sessionStrategy=none. Disabled by default.

messageCount.description: Legacy compatibility field. Mapped to memoryReflection.messageCount.

agentId.description: Optional dedicated agent id used to run reflection generation (for example: memory-distiller).

auth.description: LLM authentication mode. oauth uses the local Codex/ChatGPT login cache instead of llm.apiKey.

oauthProvider.description: OAuth provider id for llm.auth=oauth. Currently supported: openai-codex.

oauthPath.description: OAuth token file for llm.auth=oauth. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/.memory-lancedb-pro/oauth.json.

enabled.description: Enable dual-write: store memories in both LanceDB and human-readable Markdown files

dir.description: Fallback directory for Markdown mirror files when agent workspace is unknown

enabled.description: Do not store USER.md-exclusive facts in LanceDB.

routeProfile.description: Treat extracted profile memories as USER.md-exclusive.

routeCanonicalName.description: Treat canonical name facts as USER.md-exclusive.

routeCanonicalAddressing.description: Treat canonical addressing facts as USER.md-exclusive.

filterRecall.description: Filter USER.md-exclusive facts out of plugin recall results.

memoryCompaction.description: Progressive summarization: periodically consolidate semantically similar old memories into refined single entries, reducing noise and improving retrieval quality over time.

enabled.description: Enable automatic compaction at gateway startup (respects cooldownHours)

minAgeDays.description: Only compact memories at least this many days old

similarityThreshold.description: Cosine similarity threshold for clustering. Higher = more conservative merges.

minClusterSize.description: Minimum cluster size required to trigger a merge

maxMemoriesToScan.description: Maximum number of memories to scan per compaction run

cooldownHours.description: Minimum hours between automatic compaction runs

sessionCompression.description: Session compression settings for auto-capture. Scores and compresses conversation texts to prioritize high-signal content.

enabled.description: Enable session compression before auto-capture extraction

minScoreToKeep.description: Minimum score threshold. If all texts score below this, fallback to keeping at least the last few texts.

extractionThrottle.description: Adaptive extraction throttling to reduce LLM cost on low-value or rapid-fire sessions.

skipLowValue.description: Skip extraction for conversations with estimated value < 0.2

maxExtractionsPerHour.description: Maximum number of auto-capture extractions allowed per hour

embedding.apiKey.label: API Key(s)
embedding.apiKey.help: Single API key or array of keys for round-robin rotation with automatic failover on rate limits (or use ${OPENAI_API_KEY}; use a dummy value for keyless local endpoints)

embedding.model.label: Embedding Model
embedding.model.help: Embedding model name (e.g. text-embedding-3-small, gemini-embedding-001, nomic-embed-text)

embedding.baseURL.label: Base URL
embedding.baseURL.help: Custom base URL for OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoints (e.g. https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai/ for Gemini, http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama)

embedding.dimensions.label: Vector Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Override vector dimensions for custom models not in the built-in lookup table

embedding.omitDimensions.label: Omit Request Dimensions
embedding.omitDimensions.help: Do not send the dimensions parameter to the embedding API even if embedding.dimensions is configured. Useful for local models like Qwen3-Embedding that reject the field.

embedding.taskQuery.label: Query Task
embedding.taskQuery.help: Optional task selector for query embeddings (Jina: retrieval.query). If unset, no task field is sent.

embedding.taskPassage.label: Passage Task
embedding.taskPassage.help: Optional task selector for passage/document embeddings (Jina: retrieval.passage). If unset, no task field is sent.

embedding.normalized.label: Normalized Embeddings
embedding.normalized.help: Request normalized embeddings when the provider supports it (Jina v5). If unset, the field is not sent.

embedding.chunking.label: Auto-Chunk Documents
embedding.chunking.help: Automatically split long documents into chunks when they exceed embedding context limits. Enabled by default.

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Directory path for the LanceDB database files

smartExtraction.label: Smart Extraction
smartExtraction.help: Enable LLM-powered 6-category memory extraction. Falls back to regex capture when off.

llm.apiKey.label: LLM API Key
llm.apiKey.help: API key for LLM used by smart memory extraction (defaults to embedding.apiKey if omitted)

llm.model.label: LLM Model
llm.model.help: OpenAI-compatible chat model for memory extraction/summary

llm.baseURL.label: LLM Base URL
llm.baseURL.help: OpenAI-compatible base URL for LLM (defaults to embedding.baseURL if omitted)

extractMinMessages.label: Min Messages for Extraction
extractMinMessages.help: Minimum conversation messages before smart extraction triggers

extractMaxChars.label: Max Chars for Extraction
extractMaxChars.help: Maximum conversation characters to process for extraction

admissionControl.enabled.label: Admission Control
admissionControl.enabled.help: Enable A-MAC-style admission scoring before downstream dedup.

admissionControl.preset.label: Admission Preset
admissionControl.preset.help: balanced is the default; conservative favors precision; high-recall favors recall. Explicit admissionControl fields override the preset.

admissionControl.utilityMode.label: Admission Utility Mode
admissionControl.utilityMode.help: standalone adds a separate LLM utility scoring call; off disables that feature.

admissionControl.rejectThreshold.label: Admission Reject Threshold
admissionControl.rejectThreshold.help: Candidates below this weighted score are rejected before persistence.

admissionControl.admitThreshold.label: Admission Admit Threshold
admissionControl.admitThreshold.help: Higher-scoring admitted candidates are labeled as likely add cases in audit metadata; all admitted candidates still go through downstream dedup.

admissionControl.noveltyCandidatePoolSiz.label: Admission Novelty Pool
admissionControl.noveltyCandidatePoolSiz.help: Number of nearby memories to compare for novelty scoring.

admissionControl.auditMetadata.label: Admission Audit Metadata
admissionControl.auditMetadata.help: Persist per-memory admission scores and reasons in metadata for debugging.

admissionControl.persistRejectedAudits.label: Persist Reject Audits
admissionControl.persistRejectedAudits.help: Write rejected admission decisions to a JSONL audit log for later review.

admissionControl.rejectedAuditFilePath.label: Reject Audit File
admissionControl.rejectedAuditFilePath.help: Optional JSONL path for rejected admission audit records. Defaults beside the plugin memory data directory.

admissionControl.recency.halfLifeDays.label: Admission Recency Half-Life
admissionControl.recency.halfLifeDays.help: Controls how quickly recency rises as similar memories get older.

admissionControl.weights.label: Admission Weights
admissionControl.weights.help: Feature weights are normalized at runtime before scoring.

admissionControl.typePriors.label: Admission Type Priors
admissionControl.typePriors.help: Category priors for long-term retention likelihood.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations (enabled by default)

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

autoRecallMinLength.label: Auto-Recall Min Length
autoRecallMinLength.help: Minimum prompt length to trigger auto-recall (shorter prompts are skipped). Default: 15 chars for English, 6 for CJK.

autoRecallMinRepeated.label: Auto-Recall Min Repeated
autoRecallMinRepeated.help: Minimum number of conversation turns before a specific memory can be re-injected in the same session.

autoRecallMaxItems.label: Auto-Recall Max Items
autoRecallMaxItems.help: Maximum memories that auto-recall can inject in one turn.

autoRecallMaxChars.label: Auto-Recall Max Chars
autoRecallMaxChars.help: Maximum total characters injected by auto-recall in one turn.

autoRecallPerItemMaxChars.label: Auto-Recall Per-Item Max Chars
autoRecallPerItemMaxChars.help: Maximum characters per injected memory summary.

autoRecallMaxQueryLength.label: Auto-Recall Max Query Length
autoRecallMaxQueryLength.help: Maximum character length of the auto-recall query before truncation. Default: 2000.

recallMode.label: Recall Mode
recallMode.help: Auto-recall depth: full (default), summary (L0 only), adaptive (intent-based category routing), off.

maxRecallPerTurn.label: Max Recall Per Turn
maxRecallPerTurn.help: Hard per-turn injection cap. Acts as a safety ceiling on top of Auto-Recall Max Items. Default: 10.

captureAssistant.label: Capture Assistant Messages
captureAssistant.help: Also auto-capture assistant messages (default false to reduce memory pollution)

retrieval.mode.label: Retrieval Mode
retrieval.mode.help: Use hybrid search (vector + BM25) or vector-only for backward compatibility

retrieval.vectorWeight.label: Vector Search Weight
retrieval.vectorWeight.help: Weight for vector similarity in hybrid search (0-1)

retrieval.bm25Weight.label: BM25 Search Weight
retrieval.bm25Weight.help: Weight for BM25 keyword search in hybrid search (0-1)

retrieval.minScore.label: Minimum Score Threshold
retrieval.minScore.help: Drop results below this relevance score (0-1)

retrieval.rerank.label: Reranking Mode
retrieval.rerank.help: Re-score fused results for better quality (cross-encoder uses configured reranker API)

retrieval.rerankApiKey.label: Reranker API Key
retrieval.rerankApiKey.help: Reranker API key for cross-encoder reranking

retrieval.rerankTimeoutMs.label: Rerank Timeout (ms)
retrieval.rerankTimeoutMs.help: Rerank API timeout in milliseconds. Increase for local/CPU-based rerank servers.

retrieval.rerankProvider.label: Reranker Provider
retrieval.rerankProvider.help: Provider format: jina (default), siliconflow, voyage, pinecone, dashscope, or tei

retrieval.candidatePoolSize.label: Candidate Pool Size
retrieval.candidatePoolSize.help: Number of candidates to fetch before fusion and reranking

retrieval.lengthNormAnchor.label: Length Normalization Anchor
retrieval.lengthNormAnchor.help: Entries longer than this (chars) get score penalized to prevent long entries dominating. 0 = disabled.

retrieval.hardMinScore.label: Hard Minimum Score
retrieval.hardMinScore.help: Discard results below this score after all scoring stages. Higher = fewer but more relevant results.

retrieval.timeDecayHalfLifeDays.label: Time Decay Half-Life
retrieval.timeDecayHalfLifeDays.help: Old entries lose score over this many days. Floor at 0.5x. 0 = disabled.

decay.recencyHalfLifeDays.label: Decay Half-Life
decay.recencyHalfLifeDays.help: Base half-life for Weibull lifecycle decay.

decay.frequencyWeight.label: Decay Frequency Weight
decay.frequencyWeight.help: Weight of access frequency in lifecycle score.

decay.intrinsicWeight.label: Decay Intrinsic Weight
decay.intrinsicWeight.help: Weight of importance × confidence in lifecycle score.

tier.coreAccessThreshold.label: Core Access Threshold
tier.coreAccessThreshold.help: Minimum recall count before promoting to core.

tier.coreCompositeThreshold.label: Core Composite Threshold
tier.coreCompositeThreshold.help: Minimum lifecycle composite before promoting to core.

tier.peripheralCompositeThreshold.label: Peripheral Composite Threshold
tier.peripheralCompositeThreshold.help: Memories below this lifecycle score can demote to peripheral.

tier.peripheralAgeDays.label: Peripheral Age Days
tier.peripheralAgeDays.help: Age threshold for demoting stale working memories.

sessionMemory.enabled.label: Session Memory (Deprecated)
sessionMemory.enabled.help: Legacy compatibility: true maps to systemSessionMemory, false maps to none.

sessionMemory.messageCount.label: Session Message Count (Legacy)
sessionMemory.messageCount.help: Legacy compatibility field; mapped to memoryReflection.messageCount.

selfImprovement.enabled.label: Self-Improvement
selfImprovement.enabled.help: Enable self-improvement reminder and governance tools

selfImprovement.skipSubagentBootstrap.label: Skip Subagent Bootstrap
selfImprovement.skipSubagentBootstrap.help: Do not inject reminder file into subagent bootstrap context

memoryReflection.storeToLanceDB.label: Store Reflection To LanceDB
memoryReflection.storeToLanceDB.help: Persist reflection event + item rows to LanceDB (effective only under memoryReflection strategy)

memoryReflection.writeLegacyCombined.label: Write Legacy Combined Reflection
memoryReflection.writeLegacyCombined.help: Compatibility switch: also write legacy combined memory-reflection rows during migration.

memoryReflection.agentId.label: Reflection Agent Id
memoryReflection.agentId.help: Optional dedicated agent id used for reflection generation (e.g. memory-distiller)

memoryReflection.messageCount.label: Reflection Message Count
memoryReflection.messageCount.help: Recent messages included in reflection input

memoryReflection.maxInputChars.label: Reflection Max Input Chars
memoryReflection.maxInputChars.help: Max prompt chars sent to reflection run

memoryReflection.errorReminderMaxEntries.label: Error Reminder Max Entries
memoryReflection.errorReminderMaxEntries.help: Max recent error hints injected into prompt

memoryReflection.dedupeErrorSignals.label: Dedupe Error Signals
memoryReflection.dedupeErrorSignals.help: Deduplicate repeated error signatures per session

scopes.default.label: Default Scope
scopes.default.help: Default memory scope for new memories

scopes.definitions.label: Scope Definitions
scopes.definitions.help: Define custom memory scopes with descriptions

scopes.agentAccess.label: Agent Access Control
scopes.agentAccess.help: Define which scopes each agent can access

enableManagementTools.label: Management Tools
enableManagementTools.help: Enable management/debug tools such as memory_list, memory_stats, and governance-oriented self-improvement review/extract actions.

mdMirror.enabled.label: Markdown Mirror
mdMirror.enabled.help: Write a human-readable Markdown copy alongside LanceDB storage (dual-write mode)

mdMirror.dir.label: Mirror Fallback Directory
mdMirror.dir.help: Fallback directory when agent workspace mapping is unavailable

workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.enable.label: USER.md Exclusive Facts
workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.enable.help: Skip storing USER.md-owned facts in LanceDB and keep them out of plugin recall.

workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.routeP.label: Exclude Profile Memories
workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.routeP.help: Treat extracted profile memories as USER.md-only facts.

workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.routeC.label: Exclude Canonical Name
workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.routeC.help: Treat canonical name facts as USER.md-only facts.

workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.routeC.label: Exclude Canonical Addressing
workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.routeC.help: Treat canonical addressing facts as USER.md-only facts.

workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.filter.label: Filter USER.md Facts From Recall
workspaceBoundary.userMdExclusive.filter.help: Hide USER.md-exclusive facts from plugin auto-recall and memory_recall output.

llm.auth.label: LLM Auth
llm.auth.help: api-key uses llm.apiKey or embedding.apiKey. oauth uses a plugin-scoped OAuth token file by default.

llm.oauthProvider.label: LLM OAuth Provider
llm.oauthProvider.help: OAuth provider id used when llm.auth=oauth. Currently supported: openai-codex.

llm.oauthPath.label: LLM OAuth File
llm.oauthPath.help: OAuth token file used when llm.auth=oauth. Default: ~/.openclaw/.memory-lancedb-pro/oauth.json

llm.timeoutMs.label: LLM Timeout (ms)
llm.timeoutMs.help: Request timeout for the smart-extraction / upgrade LLM in milliseconds

memoryCompaction.enabled.label: Auto Compaction
memoryCompaction.enabled.help: Automatically consolidate similar old memories at gateway startup. Also available on-demand via the memory_compact tool (requires enableManagementTools).

memoryCompaction.minAgeDays.label: Min Age (days)
memoryCompaction.minAgeDays.help: Memories younger than this are never touched by compaction

memoryCompaction.similarityThreshold.label: Similarity Threshold
memoryCompaction.similarityThreshold.help: How similar two memories must be to merge (0–1). 0.88 is a good starting point; raise to 0.92+ for conservative merges.

memoryCompaction.cooldownHours.label: Cooldown (hours)
memoryCompaction.cooldownHours.help: Minimum gap between automatic compaction runs

sessionCompression.enabled.label: Session Compression
sessionCompression.enabled.help: Score and compress conversation texts before auto-capture to prioritize high-signal content (corrections, decisions, tool calls)

sessionCompression.minScoreToKeep.label: Compression Min Score
sessionCompression.minScoreToKeep.help: Minimum text score threshold. If all texts score below this, keep at least the last few texts as fallback.

extractionThrottle.skipLowValue.label: Skip Low-Value Conversations
extractionThrottle.skipLowValue.help: Skip auto-capture for conversations estimated to have low memory value (< 0.2)

extractionThrottle.maxExtractionsPerHour.label: Max Extractions Per Hour
extractionThrottle.maxExtractionsPerHour.help: Rate limit for auto-capture extractions. Prevents excessive LLM calls during rapid-fire sessions.
